name: chrX_Xp21_DMD_intragenic_SD
description: Xp21.2 region containing DMD (dystrophin), the largest human gene (~2.4 Mb). DMD carries multiple intronic SDs and LINE-rich segments that drive recurrent intragenic deletions/duplications (the molecular basis of Duchenne and Becker muscular dystrophy in ~70% of cases). Hot deletion BPs are in introns 44-55 and 2-20.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SDs and LINE-rich segments scattered through DMD introns; recurrent NAHR / non-homologous BPs cluster in two hotspots (exons 2-20 and 44-55).
